data.current_description: Send an SMS message to a single recipient.
data.description_suggestion: Sends an SMS message to a single recipient in Sri Lanka. Requires authentication via API key and user email. Accepts recipient phone number, message content, and optional sender ID. Returns a SendResponse object containing the message ID, status, and delivery confirmation. Deducts SMS credits from the account balance upon successful submission.

data.current_summary: Send bulk SMS with same message
data.current_description: Send the same SMS message to multiple recipients.
data.description_suggestion: Sends an identical SMS message to multiple recipients in Sri Lanka. Requires authentication via API key and user email. Deducts SMS credits from the account balance based on the number of recipients.
